updates.message: Good morning, Nadav! It's 8:28 AM — hope you slept well. Have a great and productive Monday! 🌅

Hey Nadav! Good Sunday morning from your Miami kitchen. Quick heads up: heavy thunderstorms are rolling into Miami this afternoon, so wrap up any outdoor plans before 1 PM. The F1 Miami Grand Prix has already moved its start time up to 1 PM today specifically because of the incoming storms — so if you're watching, it starts NOW (or very soon). Stay dry!

Good morning Nadav! Miami weather alert: Heavy rainstorms expected this afternoon. The F1 Miami Grand Prix actually moved their race start UP to 1:00 PM today because of it — so if you're planning to be outside, do it before ~2 PM. Highs around 83-88°F this morning before it gets messy.
Good morning Nadav! Looks like a beautiful Sunday in Miami — 84F and sunny today, typical gorgeous May weather. Enjoy that kitchen and the tropical view, nothing urgent to flag this morning!

Good morning, Nadav! Nice kitchen by the way. Hope the Sunday is off to a great start! Nothing urgent breaking this morning — top story is Trump clarifying the US naval blockade on Iran doesn't contradict his "hostilities terminated" claim, so geopolitics are still simmering. Enjoy your Sunday morning coffee!
Good morning Nadav! Hope you slept well — it's Sunday May 3rd, 8:39 AM. I'm already on the case fixing your Movie Studio app right now!
Evening check-in, Nadav! Nothing major has changed since earlier — the Iran-US standoff is still the top story. Hope you're winding down and enjoying your Saturday night!

Good evening, Nadav! Evening recap for Saturday, May 2nd: The big story tonight is the US fast-tracking $8 billion in arms sales to Mideast allies as Iran warns renewed conflict with the US is possible after Trump rejected Iran's latest nuclear proposal — worth keeping an eye on. Otherwise, looks like a quiet Saturday. Hope you had a great day!

Evening check-in Nadav! Based on your photo I can see palm trees — looks like you might be in Florida. Heads up: there's a slight risk of severe thunderstorms in eastern Florida today, so keep an eye on the sky tonight. Also, temperatures are running 10+ degrees above seasonal — stay cool out there!

Hey Nadav! Quick heads-up: I can see a photo was shared, but I'm not able to identify who the person in the image is. If you'd like to tell me who it is or what you need help with regarding this photo, I'm ready to assist!

Hey Nadav, you're looking a little tired this morning - might be time for a coffee break! Nothing critical in the news today, but heads up: it's May 1st, International Workers' Day. Hope the day picks up for you!

Good morning Nadav! Here's your email briefing for Friday, May 1st:

🚨 URGENT - ACTION REQUIRED:
1. Railway build failed — your "handsome-playfulness" project/Jarvis service failed to build. Check Railway dashboard.
2. Neon payment failed — Invoice #SYPKHT-00002 couldn't be processed. Update your payment info.
3. DigitalOcean invoice unpaid — $12.00 due for April 2026. Payment method failed.
4. Shopify trial expiring — extend for $1 to keep building without interruption.

📈 FYI:
- Stock market hit fresh highs yesterday — best month in years (Investopedia).
- AP Exam prep reminder from College Board.
- 25 Facebook notifications pending.

That's your morning rundown — biggest priorities are the 3 payment/billing issues. Have a great day!

Good morning Nadav! Here's your email rundown for May 1st:

⚠️ URGENT - Payment Failed: Neon LLC invoice #SYPKHT-00002 failed to process — you'll want to update your payment info.
⚠️ URGENT - DigitalOcean: Failed to charge card ending in 1940, unpaid balance of $12.00 due.
🛍️ Shopify: Your trial is expiring — extend it for just $1.
📚 College Board: AP Exam day prep reminder sent.
📈 Investopedia: Markets hit fresh highs yesterday — best month in years.
🎮 Ubisoft: Account update request regarding state of residence.
📘 Facebook: 25 unread notifications from Mercedes and Tangela.
🎵 NYT Games: Bonus crossword puzzle co-made by Jeff Tweedy of Wilco.

Top priority: Fix your payment methods on Neon and DigitalOcean!
